As a module user
I want Oliver to answer free-form questions with page context
So that I can get quick guidance without leaving the workspace

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] OliverDock can send recent message history and page context to the chat API.
- [ ] The API returns assistant text and model metadata back into the dock.
